event.info_desc:
# RVDiA IS BACK!

RVDiA has returned with major upgrades across the board! From the brand new Guild system, proportional combat mechanics, to a much smarter and more challenging AI.

Thank you for your patience during this development phase. This Rebirth is proof of my dedication to delivering a more exciting and deep experience for all Hunters in Re:Volution!

**Update Log:**
- `Guild System`: Create and manage your own guild!
- `Proportional Combat`: Damage and healing are now based on HP percentages.
- `Smart AI`: Enemies can now switch strategies and spy on your stats!
- `Karma Luck`: Your luck now truly affects the battlefield.

Thank you very much!
-Schryzon, May 2026

game.welcome_registered:
Your account has been registered!
Welcome to Re:Volution, **`{name}`**!
game.guide_desc:
Hello, Dreamer! 💫
Welcome to **Re:Volution ~ The Dream World**. I will guide you to understand this world!

🛡️ **Starting Adventure**
Use `/game register` to create your account. After that, you can start exploring!

⚔️ **Combat**
• `/game battle`: Fight monsters to gain EXP, Coins, and Karma.
• `/game fight`: Challenge your friends to a fierce PvP battle!
• During battle, you can Attack, Defend, use an Item, or use a Skill.
• **Karma**: The higher the Karma, the higher the chance of Critical Hits and Dodges!

💰 **Economy & Power**
• `/game shop`: Buy consumable items, equipment, or learn new skills.
• `/game account`: View your stats, coins, and karma.
• `/game adventure`: Run a short adventure for quick rewards.

📜 **Tips from RVDiA**
*"Don't forget to always equip your best gear before fighting a Boss! If you feel tired, take a rest in Xaneria."*
game.changelog_desc:
**Version 2.0.0 - Rebirth & Rebalance**
*"This dream world has evolved to be more challenging and structured."*

🔰 **New Systems & Features**
• `/game leaderboard`: Monitor who is the strongest Dreamer globally.
• `/game guide`: Full guide to start your adventure.
• `/game fix_account`: Fix and migrate your data structure to the latest system.
• `/game enemies`: The bestiary now uses a paginated system (starting with Bosses).

⚔️ **Balance & Content**
• **Global Rebalance**: Adjusted all enemy stats and HP for fairer battles.
• **Final Boss Tier**: Schryzon & RVDiA are now at the highest tier with powers beyond limits.
• **New Bosses**: Welcome **Mira** (Historia's younger sister) and **Victoria** (Historia's older sister) to the Bestiary.
• **Smarter AI**: Enemies will now analyze your stats more frequently during combat.

👜 **Shop Fixes**
• Item storage logic is now more organized between Skills, Equipment, and Items.
• Skill ownership status is now displayed in binary (YES/NO).
game.changelog_footer: Thank you for being part of Re:Volution!

game.premium_benefits_desc:
• **2x EXP & Coins**: Adventures become faster!
• **💎 Exclusive Badge**: Stand out on profile & leaderboard.
• **🏰 Guild Priority**: Cheaper guild creation fees (coming soon).
• **💖 Support**: Help the development of Re:Volution!
game.premium_buy_desc:
Support the development of this bot for only **Rp 15.000 / 30 Days**!

**Steps:**
1. Open the following Saweria link: **[Click Here]({saweria_link})**
2. Complete the payment (nominal Rp 15.000).
3. Save/Screenshot the successful payment proof.
4. Run command `/premium claim` and attach the screenshot.

*Premium status will be activated by admin as soon as verification is complete.*
